Championship Belts Shop

Shop all

WWFBelt.com

At wwfbelt.com, we specialize in crafting exceptional championship belts that capture the essence of wrestling’s greatest leagues. From the electrifying world of WWE to the legendary eras of WWF ,our skilled artisans design and manufacture custom belts with precision and passion, bringing fans closer to the glory of their favorite franchises.

Featured Collection

  • WWWF Heavyweight Cast 70’s & Early 80’s Wrestling Champion Belt Bruno Sammartino

    Sale

1 / of 3
View all

Things To Know

How Do We Do It

The process of making a championship belt starts with concept and design, where designers create detailed sketches of the main plate, side plates, and strap layout, ensuring a unique and iconic look. Next, the metal plates are crafted using high-quality zinc or brass, which are etched, engraved, or molded to showcase intricate details, logos, and patterns. Once shaped, the plates undergo polishing and plating with gold, silver, or nickel for a premium finish. Meanwhile, the leather strap is cut, dyed, and embossed, ensuring durability and flexibility for a perfect fit. The metal plates are securely attached to the strap using rivets or screws, followed by the placement of decorative stones, paint, or enamel to enhance the belt’s aesthetics. Finally, a quality check is performed, ensuring precision, durability, and authenticity, before the belt is carefully packaged and shipped to its rightful champion.

Customization Options

Make your championship belt truly unique with a range of personalization features, including custom nameplates, distinctive side plates, and a variety of strap colors to match your preference. Whether you're a collector, a passionate wrestling fan, or looking for a special trophy, these customization options allow you to create a belt that reflects your identity or brand. Choose from different engraving styles, logo placements, and premium materials to craft a one-of-a-kind piece that stands out. Elevate your belt’s appearance with high-quality finishes and intricate detailing, ensuring it remains a prized possession for years to come.

Care & Maintenance

To keep your championship belt in pristine condition, regular cleaning, proper storage, and preservation are essential. Use a soft microfiber cloth to wipe down the metal plates and a mild, non-abrasive cleaner to remove dust or fingerprints. Avoid harsh chemicals that could damage the finish. Store your belt in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity, to prevent fading or tarnishing. If the belt has a leather strap, apply a leather conditioner occasionally to maintain its flexibility and prevent cracking. For long-term preservation, consider using a protective case to shield it from dust and accidental damage, ensuring it remains a stunning collectible for years to come.

Shipping And Returns

Once your order is processed and payment is confirmed, we will Start Processing your item. We use reliable couriers such as UPS, DHL, FedEx, EMS, and SKYNET for delivery within 7-9 days. You will receive a tracking number for shipment confirmation. The order will be delivered within 16 days of ordering.

We accept refunds within 14 days of receipt for items returned in their original, unused condition with all tags and packaging. Please include a copy of the receipt or proof of purchase. Return shipping costs are the buyer's responsibility, and original shipping fees are non-refundable. Refunds will be issued to the original payment method after we receive and inspect the returned item. Contact us with any issues before returning.

Customer Reviews

Nothing speaks louder than the words of our satisfied customers! Our championship belts have received outstanding feedback from collectors, wrestling enthusiasts, and sports fans alike. Customers love the authentic craftsmanship, premium materials, and intricate detailing that make each belt a true masterpiece. Many buyers have shared how our belts exceed expectations, with their durability, vibrant etchings, and comfortable adjustable straps making them perfect for both display and wear.

From casual fans to dedicated collectors, our customers appreciate the accurate design, high-quality metal plates, and rich leather straps, ensuring every piece is a premium replica of the real deal. Whether it’s a gift for a die-hard wrestling fan, a celebration of a personal achievement, or a collector’s centerpiece, our belts continue to impress. Read through real testimonials to see why our replica championship belts are a must-have addition to any collection!

About us

Since 2010, WWF Belt has become a top online platform for Championship Belts. With a strong presence in the USA and a vast network in Europe, the UK, USA, and Canada, we offer high-quality and customized belts for pro wrestling organizations and global customers. Explore our premium selection for an unparalleled championship experience.
